name: SideChannel, Inc.
summary: PART I Business Overview & Strategy SideChannel is a cybersecurity advisory services and software company. Our mission is to make cybersecurity simple and accessible for mid-market and emerging companies, a market that we believe is currently underserved. Our solutions provide effective cybersecurity risk management for our clients. We anticipate that our target customers will continue to need cost-effective security solutions.
